title: CrossCountry IET Pack
description: CrossCountry liveried Class 802 units, for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![XC IET (Pride Variant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4842fefda68e3807b01d00cf4b3499f6be9c8428.png)


# **CrossCountry IET Pack V1.0**

These are a set of 3 XC reskins for the Class 802. In essence, think of it as an alternate universe where Virgin Trains saw in the arrival of IETs to XC, and one where someone at CrossCountry knew what electricity was instead of running diesels for miles under the magical knitting!

Included are:
Class 802 **Virgin CrossCountry** - The VT livery carried by Voyagers, applied to the 802s

Class 802 **CrossCountry** - The current, (and soon to be replaced) livery introduced by Arriva when they took over from Virgin in the late 2000s

Class 802 **CrossCountry Pride** - The livery variation recently applied to 220005 with rainbow "XC" crosses on each cab end
